creator: kristinacors
caption: Don’t miss out on this free flight to Bermuda for travel Tuesday! Watch until the end for all of the important details! #traveldeals #travelhacks #traveltuesday2025 #freeflight #flightdeals

transcription.text: Here's how to get a free flight to Bermuda for Travel Tuesday. So when you book a vacation package with Bermuda Holidays for three nights or more, you will get free airfare, taxes and fees excluded. The deal is available between November 20th and November 30th and it's for travel between December 1st and March 31st, 2026. By the way, for those not booking a package, you can still get 40% off base fares between November 25th and November 30th. Let me know in the comments if you're booking a trip to Bermuda and follow for more Travel Tuesday deals.
